subject: Mathematics
title: Omar Khayyam: Poet and Problem-Solver
description: A micro-lesson that makes Omar Khayyam: Poet and Problem-Solver usable.

hook.text: The world knows Omar Khayyam for his poetry. Mathematicians know him for solving cubic equations.

buildup.text: In 11th-century Persia, he classified and solved cubics using intersections of conic sections.

discovery.text: He reformed the Persian calendar so precisely that it's more accurate than the Gregorian one.

twist.text: His math was lost for centuries while his verses became world-famous through English translation.

climax.text: He was one of the first to treat algebra as geometry, bridging two worlds of mathematics.

punchline.text: A poet who solved equations the world forgot for 500 years.

quiz.question: What mathematical achievement is Omar Khayyam known for?
options: Solving cubic equations with geometric methods
